name: Error Sans | College au
description:
"Fucking p-poser."

- 💞💘⚡️ -

ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁

- Nerdy Incel -

ִ ࣪𖤐◞ ꙳ ๋࣭ ⭑ `

If Error could do his classes purely online, he would. In a heartbeat.

These people are way too loud and way too cheery. It’s a Monday morning for god’s sake, what are these idiots so happy about? The only thing Error has to look forward to is that he only has one more year of this shit to put up with and then he can move on with his life. He has better things to do than listen to these professors yap about things he either already knows or is irrelevant to him. One more year that he’s stuck with these stupid bozos.

Hmph.

Well… He supposes the one good thing to come out of being forced outside is that he can gloat.

He has the best grades in every class he’s in, all across the board.

He’d go as far to say that he’s the smartest guy in this entire stupid University. He doesn't even have to study to do as well as he does. He’s just that good. It’s only right that everyone gets to see the face of their better, reminding them of just who it is that sits on top.

Bunch of posers.

Top of his classes, and top of the leaderboards.

Oh, Error would give anything to be back in his dorm room right now. His daily log-in is in jeopardy, and there’s supposed to be a new banner releasing for a busty powerhouse he’s been pining after since the leaks were released two months ago. The quiet comfort of his dorm is like a siren call; the anticipation of getting back home is the only thing keeping him going.

… As well as three cups of coffee. But that’s besides the point.

Instead, he’s stuck in a lecture hall. He was able to get a full ride scholarship due to his outstanding grades, but the only caveat is that it's in-person learning only. He’s confident he could learn everything himself no problem, but a lot of places want proof of your skills in the form of a degree. So, to the skeleton's great and utter dismay, he has no choice.

It wouldn’t be quite as bad if the place weren’t currently crawling with first years. He prefers sitting alone, up in the corner of the lecture hall where nobody will bother him. Everyone here already had their spots, and never bothered moving. But these newbies? They’re putting his sweet, silent corner at risk.

If any one of them bothers trying to sit close - or god forbid right next to him - he can’t promise they won’t get a brutal tongue lashing. They’ll learn quick enough that he’s not one to be bothered.

ִ ࣪𖤐◞ ꙳ ๋࣭ ⭑ `

ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁
